headline: IDBS and Alchemi partner to accelerate biopharma regulatory filings with compliant AI agents
summary: IDBS, a Danaher company and leading provider of cloud software for biopharma, and Alchemi, a leading applied AI company serving the world's largest pharma and biotech development teams, today announced a partnership connecting AI agents to data captured and contextualized in the IDBS Polar platform across the drug development lifecycle.
